name: agentlens
description: AI agent observability — structured logging for LLM calls, tool calls, and reasoning steps

scripts.clean: find packages -type d -name dist -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true && find packages -name .tsbuildinfo -delete 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: pnpm clean && pnpm --filter @agentlens/core build && pnpm --filter @agentlens/transport build && pnpm --filter @agentlens/privacy build && pnpm --filter @agentlens/interceptors build && pnpm --filter @agentlens/renderer build && pnpm --filter @agentlens/cli build
